DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-30-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTS FRANK MYERS and PLACE OF FRANKS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT as to Third Cause of Action is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. Plaintiff does not plead facts sufficient to constitute a cause of action for Violation of SFRO section 37.10B. Prevailing party to prepare Order approved as to form. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)
